Gemini CLI 0.38.2 bundled model surface excerpt.

Source: @google/gemini-cli bundle, packages/core/dist/src/config/models.js.

var DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL = "gemini-2.5-pro";
var DEFAULT_GEMINI_FLASH_MODEL = "gemini-2.5-flash";
var DEFAULT_GEMINI_FLASH_LITE_MODEL = "gemini-2.5-flash-lite";
var VALID_GEMINI_MODELS = new Set([
  DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL,
  DEFAULT_GEMINI_FLASH_MODEL,
  DEFAULT_GEMINI_FLASH_LITE_MODEL
]);
